content.query:
SELECT 

top(100)

emp.EmployeeID as PersonID
,hrr.HRRecordID
,CASE
    WHEN emp.Gender = 'Female' THEN '01'
    WHEN emp.Gender = 'Male' THEN '02'
    ELSE '03' 
    END AS GenderID
,CASE 
    WHEN PayBandID IN 
                (Select DISTINCT PayBandID
                FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_payband_dim]
                WHERE 
                IsActive = 'Y'
                AND PSGroupCode IN ('APO','BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3'))
    THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE 'N' 
    END as InspectorFlag
,CASE 
    WHEN PayBandID IN 
                (Select DISTINCT PayBandID
                FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_payband_dim]
                WHERE 
                IsActive = 'Y'
                AND PSGroupCode IN ('APO','BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3'))
    THEN emp.Postcode 
    ELSE NULL
    END as InspectorPostCode
--,emp_f.EmployeeNumber as PersonNumber
,hrr.LocationID
,hrr.PayBandID as GradeID
,hrr.PersonnelAreaID
,hrr.PayrollAreaID
,hrr.OrganisationalUnitID
,hrr.PersonnelSubAreaID
,hrr.ContractID as WorkContractID
,emp.FirstName as EmployeeFirstName
,emp.LastName as EmployeeFirstName
,(emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName) as EmployeeName
,m1.managerEmployeeID as L1ManagerID
,(emp1.FirstName + ' ' + emp1.LastName) as L1ManagerName
,m2.managerEmployeeID as L2ManagerID
,(emp2.FirstName + ' ' + emp2.LastName) as L2ManagerName
--Inspector Location
--Location

 Select top(1000) Datepart(year, DOB) 


 SELECT 
Count(EmployeeID)
 ,CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 19 THEN '16-19'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 39 THEN '39-39'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 64 THEN '60-64'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) >= 65 THEN '65 & Over'
    ELSE 'Not Available' 
    END AS age 
 FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] emp
 GROUP BY 
 CASE
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 19 THEN '16-19'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 29 THEN '20-29'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 39 THEN '39-39'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 49 THEN '40-49'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 59 THEN '50-59'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) <= 64 THEN '60-64'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(yy,DOB,GETDATE()) >= 65 THEN '65 & Over'
    ELSE 'Not Available' 
    END


 16-19
20-29
39-39
40-49
50-59
60-64
65 & Over
N/A
Not #reported



 Select * FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp
 Select * FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact] 

 --LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] emp_f
 --ON emp_f.EmployeeID = emp.EmployeeID
 --AND emp_f.IsActive = 'Y'

 LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact] hrr
 ON hrr.EmployeeID = emp.EmployeeID
 AND hrr.IsActive = 'Y'

 LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim] m1
 ON m1.EmployeeID = emp.EmployeeID
 AND m1.IsActive = 'Y'

 LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp1
 ON m1.managerEmployeeID = emp1.EmployeeID
 AND emp1.IsActive = 'Y'
  
  LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim] m2
 ON m2.EmployeeID = m1.managerEmployeeID
 AND m2.IsActive = 'Y'

  LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp2
 ON m2.managerEmployeeID = emp2.EmployeeID
 AND emp2.IsActive = 'Y'

 WHERE emp.IsActive = 'Y'

--AND emp.FirstName = 'Ailsa'
--AND emp.LastName = 'Berry'
